mapper.select: /* pcy.study.server.domain.User.findById */ SELECT id , userId , password , nickname , isWithDraw , isAdmin , createdAt FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
/* pcy.study.server.domain.User.findByIdAndPassword */ SELECT id , userId , password , nickname , isWithDraw , isAdmin , createdAt FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND password = #{password}
/* pcy.study.server.domain.User.findByUserIdAndPassword */ SELECT id , userId , password , nickname , isWithDraw , isAdmin , createdAt FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId} AND password = #{password}
/* pcy.study.server.domain.User.findByUserId */ SELECT id , userId , password , nickname , isWithDraw , isAdmin , createdAt FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId}
